# NotebookCV


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

This file will become your README and also the index of your
documentation.

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install NotebookCV in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure NotebookCV package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to NotebookCV
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/suvambh/NotebookCV):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/suvambh/NotebookCV.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/suvambh/NotebookCV)

``` sh
$ conda install -c suvambh NotebookCV
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/NotebookCV/)

``` sh
$ pip install NotebookCV
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/suvambh/NotebookCV)’s
[pages](https://suvambh.github.io/NotebookCV/). Additionally you can
find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/suvambh/NotebookCV) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/NotebookCV/) respectively.
